visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a man in a light blue, short-sleeved collared shirt. He has a serious and determined expression, with his mouth slightly open as if speaking. In the blurred background, another man in a dark shirt and a blue lanyard looks on with a concerned expression. The setting appears to be an office or a briefing room. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man in the foreground. A man speaks with a determined and slightly tense voice, stating, "这次能抓到他们" (We can catch them this time). His tone is one of focused resolve, as if confirming a plan.

The camera angle shifts to a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and tie, standing in front of a whiteboard. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands, looking towards a group of people. The whiteboard behind him is covered with a collage of black-and-white photographs, seemingly of people, and some handwritten notes. The man in the light blue shirt is visible on the right, listening intently. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. Another man responds with a firm and
